events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Drumming legend
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! Ringo Starr, the rhythmic heart of The Beatles, is celebrating his birthday. Which of his drum beats is your all-time favourite?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! From stadium anthems to iconic guitar solos, his influence is undeniable.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock icon
angles.copy: Eighty-three years of pure rock and roll! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: Anniversary of MTV's launch
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed...
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV first hit screens, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us.

events.title: Anniversary of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. Still sounds as fresh as ever. What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Anniversary of Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in history.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', died on August 16, 1977, and would have been 91.

angles.name: King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. The King's music and influence live on.

events.title: Tribute to Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur died on September 13, 1996, and would have been 55.

angles.name: Remembering 2Pac
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur. His music continues to resonate with generations.

events.title: Tribute to Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix died on September 18, 1970, and would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God Tribute
angles.copy: Forty-six years since we lost a true guitar visionary. Remembering Jimi Hendrix and his revolutionary sound.

events.title: Anniversary of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover alone is legendary. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Queen
angles.copy: Seventy-five years of rock and attitude! Wishing a very happy birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Iconic voice
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing the rock and roll swagger.

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's 'Imagine' release
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless single 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Peace Anthem
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song that continues to inspire and resonate across the globe.

events.title: Anniversary of the first iPod release
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Music in your pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod dropped and changed how we listen to music forever. What was the first song you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, not stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007's enduring legacy on screen and in music. What's your favourite Bond theme?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend John Lennon.

angles.name: Lennon's legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His message of peace and love continues to inspire.
